subject: feat(ui): direction-aware bottom sheet snap thresholds
body:
Snap thresholds now depend on drag direction, using 5vh past the
snap point you're leaving. Dragging up: SNAP_CLOSED+5 for half,
SNAP_HALF+5 for full. Dragging down: SNAP_FULL-5 for half,
SNAP_HALF-5 for close. Makes the sheet feel more responsive to
the user's intent.

Tags: ui, mobile, bottom-sheet, ux
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: minor
